title: Chests Restoration
description: New look of chests in jappa like style!
body:
In textures update(_1.14_) devs didn't change the chest texture. So, **I did it**: with this pack the chests will look like in **new Minecraft style**.![all chests]
![chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2393f167e145f77c6ecdb0c14660dd52d8feda7.png)
The pack changes:
- **Chest** and christmas **chest**
- Big **chest** and christmas big **chest**
- Minecart **chest**
- **Chest** boat

  !!!There may be problems with animation mods!!!
